features: 【Package Included】You will receive 6 Pcs Mermaid Hair Clips, coming in 3 different colour ( bluish violet, white, blue ) to match your changing hairstyles & clothing in different occasions.
【Material】Mermaid hairclip made of high quality sequins, fabric and metal alloy. Silvery metal clip, strong, can be used for a long time.

【Exquisite Design】The Hair Clips are based on the mermaid's tail. The shells, starfish and sequins make the hairpin look more lovely and delicate. Wearing them will make you more charming in the crowd.

【Easy Use】These Mermaid hair clips are suitable for a variety of hairstyles, such as straight hair, curly hair, ponytails, short hair, braids, etc. You can use one or more at a time, depending on your needs.

【Wide Application】 Hair Clip can be applied to many situations, and let you be the brightest one in various occasions. Such as dancing, birthdays, parties, holidays, Little Girls Mermaid Theme Party, etc.
description: Product description Mermaid Tail Hair Sparkling Pin Aurora Sequins Fish Tail Hairpin Crocodile Clips Hair Clip Starfish Shell Mermaid Design Hair Clips Accessories for Women and Girls-6 pcs Directions Open the clip mechanism, position the hair clip on the desired hairstyle, and secure it in place. The hair clips are suitable for various hairstyles including straight, curly, ponytails, short hair, and braids.
